rescue_reason: Three compatibility issues required fixes: (1) all-null object columns; (2) CatBoost 1.2.10 Focal loss API; (3) GPU incompatible with Focal+AUC, OOM on full dataset

official/train.py::_label_free_feature_c.change: exclude all-null columns (92 windowed feature stubs with dtype=object and 100% null)
official/train.py::_label_free_feature_c.semantic_change: none - all-null columns carry zero information

official/modeling.py::fit_catboost.change_2: eval_metric: 'Logloss' -> 'AUC' when using Focal loss (Logloss rejects focal_gamma param)
official/modeling.py::fit_catboost.change_3: class_weights: omitted when using Focal loss (Focal loss does not support class_weights in 1.2.10)
official/modeling.py::fit_catboost.semantic_change: API compatibility fix; focal_alpha=0.25 is canonical Lin et al. 2017 default

env_var_BITOGUARD_USE_GPU=0.change: force CatBoost to CPU (Focal+AUC not implemented on GPU per CatBoost 1.2.10; GPU OOM on full 63K dataset)
env_var_BITOGUARD_USE_GPU=0.semantic_change: none - same algorithm, deterministic seed; GraphSAGE still uses GPU via PyTorch
